creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
(In reply to comment #2)
> I finally got around to restoring devel/omake
Great.

(In reply to comment #2)
> would you be interested in becoming the maintainer?
No, thanks. I just interested to restore a port, for which dist file is available. So, previous people's work (e.g. various patches and updates) is useful, as well as dependent ports.
